testcase.name: test_sandra_devon_provider_enrichment

failure.message: AssertionError: 1/25 homes missing providerName. Sample: {'locationId': '1-26377895412', 'careHome': 'Y', 'constituency': 'Central Devon', 'currentRatings': None, 'fullAddress': 'Kelly Farm, Nomansland, Tiverton, EX16 8QS', 'gacServiceTypes': [{'name': 'Residential homes', 'description': 'Care home service without nursing'}], 'lastInspection': None, 'latitude': 50.9122192, 'localAuthority': 'Devon', 'locationURL': 'https://www.cqc.org.uk/location/1-26377895412', 'longitude': -3.6127631, 'mainPhoneNumber': '07872844574', 'name': 'Kelly Farm', 'numberOfBeds': 20, 'organisationType': 'Location', 'postalAddressCounty': None, 'postalAddressLine1': 'Kelly Farm', 'postalAddressLine2': 'Nomansland', 'postalAddressTownCity': 'Tiverton', 'postalCode': 'EX16 8QS', 'postcode_district': 'EX16', 'postcode_sector': 'EX16 8', 'providerId': '1-26032324887', 'providerName': None, 'region': 'South West', 'registrationDate': '2026-02-10', 'registrationManagerName': None, 'registrationManagers': [], 'registrationStatus': 'Registered', 'regulatedActivities': [{'name': 'Accommodation for persons who require nursing or personal care', 'code': 'RA2'}], 'specialisms': [{'name': 'Caring for adults under 65 yrs'}, {'name': 'Mental health conditions'}], 'synced_at': '2026-05-19T14:53:34.878000', 'type': 'Social Care Org', 'website': None} assert not [{'careHome': 'Y', 'constituency': 'Central Devon', 'currentRatings': None, 'fullAddress': 'Kelly Farm, Nomansland, Tiverton, EX16 8QS', ...}]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_territory_plus.py:325: in test_sandra_devon_provider_enrichment assert not missing, ( E AssertionError: 1/25 homes missing providerName. Sample: {'locationId': '1-26377895412', 'careHome': 'Y', 'constituency': 'Central Devon', 'currentRatings': None, 'fullAddress': 'Kelly Farm, Nomansland, Tiverton, EX16 8QS', 'gacServiceTypes': [{'name': 'Residential homes', 'description': 'Care home service without nursing'}], 'lastInspection': None, 'latitude': 50.9122192, 'localAuthority': 'Devon', 'locationURL': 'https://www.cqc.org.uk/location/1-26377895412', 'longitude': -3.6127631, 'mainPhoneNumber': '07872844574', 'name': 'Kelly Farm', 'numberOfBeds': 20, 'organisationType': 'Location', 'postalAddressCounty': None, 'postalAddressLine1': 'Kelly Farm', 'postalAddressLine2': 'Nomansland', 'postalAddressTownCity': 'Tiverton', 'postalCode': 'EX16 8QS', 'postcode_district': 'EX16', 'postcode_sector': 'EX16 8', 'providerId': '1-26032324887', 'providerName': None, 'region': 'South West', 'registrationDate': '2026-02-10', 'registrationManagerName': None, 'registrationManagers': [], 'registrationStatus': 'Registered', 'regulatedActivities': [{'name': 'Accommodation for persons who require nursing or personal care', 'code': 'RA2'}], 'specialisms': [{'name': 'Caring for adults under 65 yrs'}, {'name': 'Mental health conditions'}], 'synced_at': '2026-05-19T14:53:34.878000', 'type': 'Social Care Org', 'website': None} E assert not [{'careHome': 'Y', 'constituency': 'Central Devon', 'currentRatings': None, 'fullAddress': 'Kelly Farm, Nomansland, Tiverton, EX16 8QS', ...}]
